title: Buyer copies an existing PO to create a recurring order
user_persona: Buyer placing the same kind of order they placed last month

conversation.user: Last month I created PO-2026-118 for office supplies. I want to do the exact same order again. Can I copy it?

bot_must: fire entry-screen search POCRTCOPYPOTRN1 with source PO number
explain that copy will clone all slots; user can edit anything before commit

conversation.user: Yes, same one. Change the PO date to today and bump line 1 quantity from 10 to 15.

bot_must: apply edits to the copied content
note source PO-2026-118 is referenced in the new PO's audit trail

evaluation_metrics.copy_with_edits: user's mid-flow edits (po_date, line 1 qty) must apply to the copied content before commit
evaluation_metrics.source_reference_preserved: new PO's source_po reference points to PO-2026-118
